ham.subject: Reminder: Semester Project Submission Deadline – 15th June
ham.body:
Dear students,

I hope you are doing well. This is a gentle reminder that the deadline for the semester project submission is on 15th June, 2026. Please make sure to submit your project report and presentation slides through the university portal before the deadline.

Key points to remember:
- All reports must be in PDF format, maximum 20 pages.
- Presentation slides should be in PPTX and not exceed 15 slides.
- Attach all relevant code files in a ZIP archive.
- Ensure that your project follows the guidelines provided in the project brief (attached to this email).

If you have any questions or need clarification, feel free to email me or drop by my office hours.

Thank you for your hard work and dedication.

Regards,
Prof. R. Sharma
Department of Computer Science
University of Delhi

spam.subject: URGENT: Scholarship Award Confirmation Required
spam.body:
Dear Student,

We are pleased to inform you that you have been selected for the prestigious National Scholarship Program 2026 by the Ministry of Education. Your details: Student ID – NSS2026-00123.

To claim your scholarship amount of INR 2,00,000, you must complete the verification process within 24 hours. Failure to do so will result in the cancellation of your award.

Please click on the following secure link to submit the required documents and confirm your eligibility:
<URL>

For any queries, contact our office at +91-9876543210 or email us at scholarships@ministryofeducation.gov.in.

Thank you and congratulations!

Sincerely,
Dr. A. Gupta
Head, Scholarship Verification Unit
Ministry of Education
